debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => G ω ⊓ H ω) P

    have hH' : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
